support_band_rules: EVIDENCE_HIGH_01: high entity match + tier 1/2 source + high/critical severity + high case linkage + (current recency OR multi_source corroboration)
EVIDENCE_HIGH_02: tier 1 source + medium/high entity match + high/critical severity + medium/high case linkage
EVIDENCE_MEDIUM_01: medium/high entity match + medium/high/critical severity + 2+ medium-support factors
EVIDENCE_LOW_01: default low support when no higher rule triggers
case_risk_rules: CASE_HIGH_01: critical adverse signal with high-support evidence
CASE_HIGH_02: two+ high-support items in material categories
CASE_MEDIUM_01: medium/high-support finding in material category
CASE_LOW_01: no material adverse findings above low-support threshold
